_meta.caveat: ESTIMATING VALUES ONLY - these are typical heat-loss figures for HVAC load estimating, not code values and not guarantees. Always replace with manufacturer certified loss data for final design.
_meta.lvDryTypeSource: Efficiency percentages are the DOE 2016 minimum efficiencies for low-voltage dry-type distribution transformers, three-phase (10 CFR 431.196), defined at 35% of nameplate load, unity PF. Verify against the printed regulation. The app derives typical no-load and load losses from these in src/calc/heatReject.js with a stated split assumption.
_meta.mvDryTypeSource: Typical no-load / full-load-winding loss watts for medium-voltage-primary dry-type (VPI/cast) unit substation transformers, entered from the author's experience with manufacturer data. LOWEST CONFIDENCE data in this file - replace with the actual transformer's certified test report whenever available.
_meta.sectionWattsSource: Typical watts dissipated per vertical section at rated load, from common industry estimating practice for electrical room HVAC loads. Editable in the app on every row.
